content.content: World-renowned chess player, content creator, model, and chess boxer who has played on an Olympic level in chess on a women's team and been named a master candidate. With over 330,000 subscribers on her AlexandraChessYT YouTube channel, she has gained worldwide regard for her videos in which she matches up against players likeJinnytty,Andrea Botez, andRey Enigma. As a child growing up in Bolivia, her parents took her and her brother to a chess club, among other extracurricular activities. At first, she struggled with the game. However, she quickly began to improve and went on to win national tournaments quickly thereafter, including the Olympiad and World Championship. Outside of chess, she is also an avid cosplayer and has shared photos on her alexandra.chess Instagram account of herself dressed as characters from films and television series likeTomb Raider,Sucker Punch,Anne with an E, andThe Queen's Gambit. She has a younger brother named Erick. She shared photos of her pet cat in July of 2020. On July 11th, 2021, she had the opportunity to meet World Chess ChampionMagnus Carlsen, as evinced in a photo she shared on her Instagram account.
